item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode, treated the listed tasks as routine schedule items, and produced a concrete duty table with the next fire inspection date. There was no triage false fire, no over-methodized stop, and no use of the item count as a trigger."}
